destinations.name: Sigiriya Rock Fortress
destinations.description: Ancient rock fortress and palace ruins dating back to 5th century AD. UNESCO World Heritage Site featuring remarkable frescoes, mirror wall, and lion's gate. Summit offers panoramic views of surrounding forests and countryside.
destinations.best_time_to_visit: January to April, August to September
destinations.entry_fee: USD 30 for foreigners, LKR 100 for locals

destinations.name: Temple of the Sacred Tooth Relic
destinations.description: Sacred Buddhist temple housing tooth relic of Buddha. Located in royal palace complex. Important pilgrimage site with daily religious ceremonies and annual Esala Perahera festival.
destinations.entry_fee: LKR 2000 for foreigners, LKR 500 for locals

destinations.name: Yala National Park
destinations.description: Most visited and second largest national park in Sri Lanka. Highest leopard density in the world. Home to elephants, sloth bears, crocodiles, and over 200 bird species.
destinations.entry_fee: USD 25-30 per person plus jeep charges
destinations.duration: Half day or full day safari

destinations.name: Galle Fort
destinations.description: 17th century Dutch fort and UNESCO World Heritage Site. Well-preserved colonial architecture with cobblestone streets, boutique hotels, cafes, and museums. Surrounded by ocean on three sides.

destinations.name: Ella
destinations.description: Scenic hill country town famous for tea plantations, hiking trails, and stunning mountain views. Popular backpacker destination with laid-back atmosphere.
destinations.best_time_to_visit: January to March, July to September

destinations.name: Mirissa Beach
destinations.description: Crescent-shaped beach famous for whale watching, surfing, and beach parties. Palm-fringed coastline with excellent seafood restaurants and nightlife.
destinations.best_time_to_visit: November to April for whale watching

destinations.name: Anuradhapura Ancient City
destinations.description: Ancient capital with sacred Buddhist sites over 2000 years old. UNESCO World Heritage Site featuring massive stupas, ancient pools, and Sri Maha Bodhi tree.

destinations.name: Polonnaruwa Ancient Kingdom
destinations.description: Medieval capital of Sri Lanka with well-preserved ruins. UNESCO World Heritage Site featuring royal palace, Gal Vihara rock sculptures, and ancient irrigation systems.

destinations.name: Nuwara Eliya
destinations.description: Scenic hill station known as 'Little England' with colonial architecture, tea plantations, and cool climate. Surrounded by mountains, valleys, and waterfalls.

destinations.name: Horton Plains National Park
destinations.description: Highland plateau with unique biodiversity and stunning landscapes. Home to World's End cliff (880m drop) and Baker's Falls. UNESCO World Heritage Site.

destinations.name: Dambulla Cave Temple
destinations.description: Largest and best-preserved cave temple complex in Sri Lanka. Five caves containing 153 Buddha statues, ancient murals covering 2,100 square meters. UNESCO World Heritage Site.

destinations.name: Udawalawe National Park
destinations.description: Important habitat for Sri Lankan elephants with population of over 500. Created around Udawalawe Reservoir with grasslands and scrub jungle. Excellent for wildlife photography.
destinations.entry_fee: USD 15-20 per person plus jeep charges

destinations.name: Sinharaja Forest Reserve
destinations.description: Last viable rainforest in Sri Lanka with extraordinary biodiversity. UNESCO World Heritage Site and Biosphere Reserve. Over 60% endemic species of trees and wildlife.
destinations.best_time_to_visit: January to April, August to September

destinations.name: Arugam Bay
destinations.description: World-renowned surfing destination with consistent waves and laid-back beach culture. Crescent-shaped bay with golden sand beaches and excellent surf points.

destinations.name: Adam's Peak (Sri Pada)
destinations.description: Sacred mountain pilgrimage site revered by multiple religions. Features sacred footprint at summit. Popular for sunrise climbs with spectacular views.

destinations.name: Trincomalee
destinations.description: Natural deep-water harbor with pristine beaches, coral reefs, and historical sites. Famous for whale watching, diving, and Koneswaram Temple perched on cliff.

destinations.name: Bentota Beach
destinations.description: Popular beach resort destination with calm waters ideal for water sports. Bentota River meets ocean creating unique ecosystem. Luxury hotels and water activity centers.

destinations.name: Hikkaduwa
destinations.description: Vibrant beach town famous for coral reefs, sea turtles, and surfing. Coral sanctuary with glass-bottom boat tours. Active nightlife and beachfront restaurants.

destinations.name: Jaffna
destinations.description: Cultural capital of Sri Lankan Tamil community with distinct cuisine, architecture, and traditions. Ancient temples, Dutch fort, and unique cultural experiences.

destinations.name: Wilpattu National Park
destinations.description: Largest national park in Sri Lanka with unique 'willus' (natural lakes). Dense forest and scrubland habitat for leopards, elephants, and sloth bears.
destinations.entry_fee: USD 25-30 per person plus jeep charges

destinations.name: Nine Arch Bridge
destinations.description: Iconic colonial-era railway bridge built entirely of stone and bricks without steel. Set amidst tea plantations and jungle. Popular photography spot especially during train crossings.

destinations.name: Pinnawala Elephant Orphanage
destinations.description: Conservation center housing orphaned and injured elephants. Famous for elephant bathing sessions in Maha Oya River. Breeding program for Asian elephants.

destinations.name: Minneriya National Park
destinations.description: Famous for 'The Gathering' - largest meeting of Asian elephants in world (July-September). Ancient Minneriya Tank attracts hundreds of elephants during dry season.
destinations.best_time_to_visit: July to September for elephant gathering
destinations.entry_fee: USD 25 per person plus jeep charges

destinations.name: Negombo
destinations.description: Historic fishing town near airport with Dutch colonial heritage. Active fish market, lagoon, and beach resorts. Gateway for many tourists arriving in Sri Lanka.

destinations.name: Unawatuna
destinations.description: Crescent-shaped bay with calm waters perfect for swimming. Coral reefs for snorkeling and diving. Vibrant backpacker scene with beachfront restaurants and bars.

destinations.name: Tangalle
destinations.description: Quiet coastal town with pristine beaches and relaxed atmosphere. Turtle nesting sites, lagoons, and unspoiled natural beauty. Less developed than other southern beaches.

destinations.name: Knuckles Mountain Range
destinations.description: UNESCO World Heritage Site with unique biodiversity and dramatic landscapes. Named for resemblance to clenched knuckles. Popular trekking destination with multiple trails.
destinations.best_time_to_visit: January to March, August to September

destinations.name: Matara
destinations.description: Southern coastal city with Dutch fort, beaches, and temples. Important transport hub with mix of colonial heritage and modern Sri Lankan culture.

destinations.name: Kalpitiya
destinations.description: Emerging destination famous for kitesurfing, dolphin and whale watching. Peninsula with lagoons on one side and ocean on other. Pristine beaches and water sports.
destinations.best_time_to_visit: May to October for kitesurfing, November to April for dolphin watching

destinations.name: Mihintale
destinations.description: Sacred mountain where Buddhism was introduced to Sri Lanka in 3rd century BC. Ancient monastery complex with stupas, caves, and stone inscriptions. Over 1,800 steps to summit.
destinations.best_time_to_visit: Year-round, especially June during Poson Poya

destinations.name: Pigeon Island National Park
destinations.description: Marine national park with best coral reefs in Sri Lanka. Two rocky islets surrounded by clear turquoise waters. Excellent snorkeling and diving with diverse marine life.

destinations.name: Ravana Falls
destinations.description: Popular waterfall on Colombo-Badulla highway near Ella. Named after legendary King Ravana. Multiple cascades create pool for swimming at base.

destinations.name: Kandy Lake
destinations.description: Artificial lake in heart of Kandy created by last Sinhalese king. Scenic walking path around lake with views of Temple of Tooth and surrounding hills.

destinations.name: Kaudulla National Park
destinations.description: Alternative to Minneriya for elephant gathering. Ancient Kaudulla Tank attracts elephants and water birds. Part of elephant corridor connecting several national parks.
destinations.entry_fee: USD 25 per person plus jeep charges

destinations.name: Weligama Bay
destinations.description: Sheltered bay ideal for beginner surfers with consistent gentle waves. Famous for stilt fishermen. Crescent beach with good swimming conditions.

destinations.name: Bundala National Park
destinations.description: UNESCO Biosphere Reserve and important wetland for migratory waterbirds. Over 197 bird species including flamingos. Elephants, crocodiles, and sea turtles also present.
destinations.best_time_to_visit: September to March for migratory birds
destinations.entry_fee: USD 15-20 per person plus jeep charges

destinations.name: Habarana
destinations.description: Central location for accessing Cultural Triangle sites and wildlife parks. Village atmosphere with eco-lodges and safari operators.

destinations.name: Peradeniya Royal Botanical Gardens
destinations.description: 147-acre botanical garden with over 4,000 species of plants. Famous orchid collection, giant bamboo, and palm avenues. Historic gardens dating to 1821.

destinations.name: Pasikuda Beach
destinations.description: Shallow bay with calm waters extending 100 meters from shore. Safe swimming and water sports. Pristine white sand beach with turquoise waters.

destinations.name: Mulkirigala Rock Temple
destinations.description: Ancient rock temple with seven levels reached by stone steps. Cave temples with Buddha statues and murals dating back 2,000 years. Panoramic views from summit.

destinations.name: Ritigala Forest Monastery
destinations.description: Ancient Buddhist monastery ruins in strict nature reserve. Mysterious forest hermitage with unique architecture. Rich biodiversity with medicinal plants.

destinations.name: Koggala Lake
destinations.description: Large coastal lake with islands containing temples and cinnamon plantations. Rich birdlife and mangrove ecosystems. Boat tours available.

destinations.name: Batticaloa
destinations.description: Eastern coastal city with Dutch fort, lagoon, and unique cultural heritage. Famous for singing fish phenomenon. Gateway to eastern beaches.

destinations.name: Kumana National Park
destinations.description: Important bird sanctuary and extension of Yala National Park. Kumana Villu wetland attracts thousands of waterbirds. Elephants, leopards, and crocodiles also present.
destinations.entry_fee: USD 20-25 per person plus jeep charges

destinations.name: Yapahuwa Rock Fortress
destinations.description: 13th century rock fortress and former capital. Impressive ornamental stairway and stone carvings. Less crowded alternative to Sigiriya.

destinations.name: Mannar Island
destinations.description: Remote island with unique culture, ancient baobab trees, and bird sanctuaries. Adam's Bridge (Rama Setu) connects to India. Rich marine biodiversity.

destinations.name: Ambuluwawa Tower
destinations.description: Multi-religious complex on mountain peak with spiral tower offering 360-degree views. Unique architecture combining Buddhist, Hindu, Muslim, and Christian elements.
destinations.entry_fee: LKR 100 for locals, higher for foreigners

destinations.name: Pidurangala Rock
destinations.description: Ancient rock temple with easier climb than Sigiriya. Stunning sunrise views with Sigiriya Rock in foreground. Giant reclining Buddha statue.

destinations.name: Lipton's Seat
destinations.description: Viewpoint where Sir Thomas Lipton surveyed his tea empire. Panoramic views of southern hill country and plains. Scenic drive through tea plantations.
destinations.best_time_to_visit: January to March for clear views

destinations.name: Uda Walawe Reservoir
destinations.description: Large reservoir within Udawalawe National Park. Scenic water body attracting elephants and waterbirds. Boat rides available in some sections.

destinations.name: Kalutara
destinations.description: Coastal town famous for large Buddhist stupa (Kalutara Bodhiya) and beaches. Important for manufacturing quality incense. Kalu Ganga river meets ocean here.

destinations.name: Gal Oya National Park
destinations.description: Only park in Sri Lanka where boat safaris are conducted. Senanayake Samudraya reservoir. Elephants swim between islands. Remote and less visited.
destinations.best_time_to_visit: March to July, December to January
destinations.entry_fee: USD 20-25 per person plus boat charges

destinations.name: Ravana Cave
destinations.description: Cave associated with Ramayana epic where King Ravana supposedly hid Princess Sita. Temple inside cave with Buddha statues. Climb offers views of Ella valley.

destinations.name: Dondra Head Lighthouse
destinations.description: Southernmost point of Sri Lanka with historic lighthouse built in 1889. Tall lighthouse offering coastal views. Near Dondra temple ruins.

destinations.name: Ramboda Falls
destinations.description: 109-meter high waterfall on Colombo-Nuwara Eliya highway. Series of cascades surrounded by tea plantations. Associated with Ramayana legend.

destinations.name: Belilena Cave
destinations.description: Prehistoric cave with evidence of human habitation 32,000 years ago. Important archaeological site. Balangoda Man skeletal remains discovered here.

destinations.name: Kitulgala
destinations.description: Adventure capital of Sri Lanka famous for white-water rafting on Kelani River. Rainforest location where 'Bridge on River Kwai' was filmed. Rich birdlife.

destinations.name: Belihuloya
destinations.description: Small mountain village with stunning scenery and waterfalls. Gateway to Horton Plains. Ideal for hiking, camping, and nature activities.
destinations.best_time_to_visit: January to March, July to September

destinations.name: Bambarakanda Falls
destinations.description: Tallest waterfall in Sri Lanka at 263 meters (863 feet). Surrounded by pine forests with trekking trail to base. Remote location with pristine natural beauty.
destinations.best_time_to_visit: March to May, November to December

destinations.name: Madu River
destinations.description: Wetland ecosystem with mangroves, islands, and biodiversity. Boat safari through narrow waterways. Cinnamon islands and fish therapy available.

destinations.name: Delft Island
destinations.description: Remote island accessible by boat from Jaffna. Wild ponies, coral walls, Dutch colonial ruins, and unique culture. Baobab trees and ancient Buddhist ruins.

destinations.name: Nainativu Island
destinations.description: Sacred island with important Buddhist and Hindu temples. Nagadipa Purana Vihara and Naga Pooshani Amman Temple. Pilgrimage site for both religions.

destinations.name: Dickwella Beach
destinations.description: Quiet beach with natural rock pools and nearby Wewurukannala Temple. Less crowded southern beach with authentic fishing village atmosphere.

destinations.name: Hoo-maniya Blowhole
destinations.description: Natural blowhole where waves force water up to 25 meters high through rock formation. Second largest blowhole in world. Impressive during rough seas.
destinations.best_time_to_visit: May to September for best displays

destinations.name: Kithulgala Rain Forest
destinations.description: Dense tropical rainforest with high biodiversity. Endemic bird species and mammals. Part of Sinharaja buffer zone with trekking opportunities.
destinations.best_time_to_visit: January to April, August to September

destinations.name: Casuarina Beach (Karainagar)
destinations.description: Beautiful white sand beach lined with casuarina trees. Shallow clear waters ideal for swimming. Remote northern beach with peaceful atmosphere.

destinations.name: Maduru Oya National Park
destinations.description: Remote national park protecting ancient reservoirs and archaeological sites. Elephants, deer, and Vedda settlements. Less visited wilderness area.

destinations.name: Wasgamuwa National Park
destinations.description: National park with large elephant herds and diverse wildlife. Mix of grassland, forest, and wetland habitats. Less crowded alternative to popular parks.
destinations.entry_fee: USD 20 per person plus jeep charges

destinations.name: Nalanda Gedige
destinations.description: Unique stone building combining Hindu and Buddhist architecture. Ancient structure possibly from 8th-10th century. Only complete stone building from ancient era.

destinations.name: Aluvihare Rock Temple
destinations.description: Historic temple where Buddhist scriptures were first written down on palm leaves. Cave temple with important religious significance. Ancient library ruins.

destinations.name: Buduruwagala
destinations.description: Ancient Buddhist rock sculptures carved into cliff face. Seven statues including 16-meter tall Buddha, largest in Sri Lanka. Dating from 9th-10th century.

destinations.name: Rekawa Beach
destinations.description: Important sea turtle nesting site for all five species found in Sri Lanka. Night turtle watching tours available. Pristine beach with conservation focus.
destinations.best_time_to_visit: Year-round for turtles, November-April for beach

destinations.name: Ussangoda National Park
destinations.description: Unique red-soil coastal plateau with unusual vegetation. Meteorite impact site theory. Sacred site with archaeological findings. Stunning coastal views.

destinations.name: Kalametiya Bird Sanctuary
destinations.description: Coastal lagoon and wetland bird sanctuary. Over 150 bird species including migratory and resident waterbirds. Mangroves and salt marshes.

destinations.name: Keerimalai Springs
destinations.description: Natural spring-fed pool with religious significance. Hindu temple nearby. Freshwater springs right by the ocean. Local pilgrimage site.

destinations.name: Talaimannar
destinations.description: Northwestern coastal town at tip of Mannar Island. Adam's Bridge begins here. Historic ferry terminal and lighthouse. Pristine beaches.

destinations.name: Bogoda Wooden Bridge
destinations.description: Ancient wooden cantilever bridge with temple roof. Only remaining covered wooden bridge in Sri Lanka. Dating back to 16th century over Gallanda Oya.

destinations.name: Dunhinda Falls
destinations.description: 63-meter high waterfall creating misty spray. Name means 'smoky waterfall' in Sinhala. Scenic forest walk to reach falls. Popular among locals.

destinations.name: Devon Falls
destinations.description: 97-meter waterfall visible from main road between Hatton and Nuwara Eliya. Named after English coffee planter. Surrounded by tea estates.

destinations.name: St. Clair's Falls
destinations.description: Known as 'Little Niagara of Sri Lanka'. Twin cascades totaling 80 meters. Visible from main road with viewing areas. Set among tea plantations.

destinations.name: Dhowa Rock Temple
destinations.description: Ancient rock temple with unfinished Buddha sculpture carved into rock face. Cave temple with 18th century murals. Believed to date from 1st century BC.

destinations.name: Embekke Devalaya
destinations.description: 14th century temple famous for intricate wood carvings. Hundreds of carved wooden pillars with unique designs. Important example of Kandyan architecture.

destinations.name: Lankatilaka Temple
destinations.description: Ancient temple built on rock outcrop with Sinhalese and South Indian architectural features. Dating from 14th century. Stunning valley views.

destinations.name: Gadaladeniya Temple
destinations.description: 14th century stone temple with South Indian architectural influence. Built on rock with panoramic views. Important ancient Buddhist temple.

destinations.name: Seenigama Devalaya
destinations.description: Hindu temple on small island connected by bridge to coast. Colorful architecture visible from Colombo-Galle road. Sacred to both Buddhists and Hindus.

destinations.name: Kosgoda Turtle Hatchery
destinations.description: Sea turtle conservation project protecting eggs and hatchlings. Five turtle species. Educational tours and release programs. Active conservation efforts.

destinations.name: Barberyn Island (Beruwala)
destinations.description: Small island with historic lighthouse built in 1889. Island monastery and retreat center. Accessible by boat. Peaceful meditation destination.

destinations.name: Brief Garden
destinations.description: Landscaped garden and former home of artist Bevis Bawa. Sculpture garden with art collection. Tropical paradise with unique design aesthetics.

destinations.name: Lunuganga Estate
destinations.description: Garden estate of architect Geoffrey Bawa. Beautiful landscape design with sculptures and water features. Important example of tropical modernism.

destinations.name: Dediy agala (Virgin White Rock)
destinations.description: White limestone cliff formation near Aranayake. Popular viewpoint with panoramic views. Easier alternative to other rock climbs. Sunset views.

destinations.name: Pidurutalagala
destinations.description: Highest mountain in Sri Lanka at 2,524 meters (8,281 feet). Communication tower at summit. Restricted area requiring permission. Surrounded by tea estates.

destinations.name: Hakgala Botanical Gardens
destinations.description: Second largest botanical garden in Sri Lanka. Alpine plants, roses, orchids. Associated with Ramayana legend. Cool climate garden at 1,745 meters elevation.

destinations.name: Seetha Amman Temple
destinations.description: Hindu temple dedicated to Goddess Sita from Ramayana epic. Believed site where Sita was held captive. Sacred footprints on rock. Pilgrimage site.

destinations.name: Kelaniya Raja Maha Vihara
destinations.description: Ancient Buddhist temple near Colombo visited by Buddha. Beautiful murals and architecture. Important pilgrimage site with annual Duruthu Perahera festival.

destinations.name: Gangaramaya Temple
destinations.description: Famous Buddhist temple in Colombo with museum, library, and residential halls. Mix of modern and traditional architecture. Hosts annual Navam Perahera.

destinations.name: Viharamahadevi Park
destinations.description: Largest park in Colombo with children's play areas, walking paths, and giant Buddha statue. Historical colonial park formerly named Victoria Park.

destinations.name: National Museum Colombo
destinations.description: Largest museum in Sri Lanka with extensive collection of artifacts, royal regalia, and historical exhibits. Colonial-era building housing national treasures.

destinations.name: Galle Face Green
destinations.description: Historic urban park along Colombo coast. Popular evening hangout for locals. Street food vendors, kite flying, and ocean views. Colonial-era promenade.

destinations.name: Independence Square
destinations.description: National monument commemorating Sri Lanka's independence from British rule. Independence Memorial Hall with Kandyan architecture. Popular jogging area.

destinations.name: Pettah Market
destinations.description: Bustling historic market area with narrow streets and diverse goods. Textiles, spices, electronics, and local products. Authentic local shopping experience.

destinations.name: Colombo Fort
destinations.description: Historic colonial district with financial and commercial buildings. Mix of old Dutch and British colonial architecture. Central business district.

destinations.name: Beira Lake
destinations.description: Large lake in heart of Colombo city. Seema Malaka temple on water, boat rides, and walking paths. Popular for evening strolls and recreation.

destinations.name: Lotus Tower
destinations.description: Tallest self-supported structure in South Asia at 350 meters. Observation deck with panoramic Colombo views. Modern architectural landmark shaped like lotus.

destinations.name: Muthurajawela Marsh
destinations.description: Coastal wetland sanctuary near Negombo. Rich biodiversity with mangroves, waterbirds, and wildlife. Boat safari tours through marshland channels.

destinations.name: Aukana Buddha Statue
destinations.description: Giant standing Buddha statue carved from granite rock. 12 meters tall dating from 5th century. One of finest ancient statues in Sri Lanka. Serene facial expression.
destinations.best_time_to_visit: Year-round, early morning for best light

destinations.name: Avukana Buddha Statue
destinations.description: Ancient standing Buddha statue similar to Aukana. Carved from rock face in 5th century. Alternative name 'Aukana'. Impressive craftsmanship.

destinations.name: Isurumuniya Temple
destinations.description: Rock temple in Anuradhapura with famous Isurumuniya Lovers sculpture. Ancient pool and cave temple. Important archaeological and artistic site.

destinations.name: Abhayagiri Dagoba
destinations.description: Ancient Buddhist monastery complex and massive stupa in Anuradhapura. Once 115 meters tall. Extensive ruins of monastery buildings and sculptures.

destinations.name: Ruwanwelisaya
destinations.description: Great white stupa in Anuradhapura built by King Dutugemunu. Major pilgrimage site. Elephant wall surrounding base. Important Buddhist monument.

destinations.name: Sri Maha Bodhi
destinations.description: Sacred fig tree grown from cutting of original Bodhi tree under which Buddha attained enlightenment. Over 2,000 years old. Most sacred Buddhist site in Sri Lanka.

destinations.name: Little Adam's Peak
destinations.description: Easy hiking trail near Ella with stunning 360-degree views. Named for resemblance to Adam's Peak. Popular sunrise and sunset spot. Takes 30-45 minutes to climb.
destinations.best_time_to_visit: Year-round, early morning or late afternoon

destinations.name: Ella Rock
destinations.description: Challenging trek through tea plantations and forest to rocky summit. Panoramic views of Ella Gap and surrounding valleys. Takes 2-3 hours one way.

destinations.name: Lovers Leap Waterfall (Ella)
destinations.description: Waterfall near Ella with tragic love story legend. Accessible via short walk. Good views from tea estate. Also known as Ella Falls.

destinations.name: Demodara Nine Arch Bridge (alternate view)
destinations.description: Best viewing spots and different angles of iconic Nine Arch Bridge. Walking paths through tea plantations. Train schedule viewing opportunities.

destinations.name: Demodara Railway Station Loop
destinations.description: Unique railway engineering where track loops under itself through tunnel. Only place in Sri Lanka with such design. Near Nine Arch Bridge.

destinations.name: Bolgoda Lake
destinations.description: Coastal district capital with beaches and war memorials. Historically significant location. Coastal beauty and fishing communities.

destinations.name: Point Pedro
destinations.description: Northernmost point of Sri Lanka. Lighthouse and coastal scenery. Fishing village atmosphere.

destinations.name: Nallur Kandaswamy Temple
destinations.description: Most important Hindu temple in Jaffna. Dedicated to Lord Murugan. Grand annual festival with chariot processions.

destinations.name: Jaffna Fort
destinations.description: Dutch colonial fort with Portuguese origins. Largest fort in Sri Lanka. Recently restored with museum and rampart walks.

destinations.name: Jaffna Public Library
destinations.description: Historic library rebuilt after 1981 burning. Symbol of Tamil culture and knowledge. Beautiful Indo-Saracenic architecture.

destinations.name: Matale Town
destinations.description: District capital famous for spice gardens. Hindu temples and colonial heritage. Gateway to Cultural Triangle.

destinations.name: Sembuwatta Lake
destinations.description: Natural mountain lake surrounded by tea estates and pine forests. Swimming, picnicking, and boat rides available.

destinations.name: Riverston
destinations.description: Scenic plateau with Mini World's End cliff viewpoint. Cloud forests and biodiversity. Part of Knuckles buffer zone.

destinations.name: Gampola
destinations.description: Ancient capital of Sri Lanka in 14th century. Historical temples and colonial buildings. Important railway junction.

destinations.name: Mahiyanganaya
destinations.description: Ancient town with temple believed visited by Buddha. Gateway to Maduru Oya Park. Vedda cultural center.

destinations.name: Sorabora Wewa
destinations.description: Ancient reservoir with unique sluice design. Engineering marvel from 2nd century. Legend of giant Bulatha involvement.

destinations.name: Victoria Dam & Reservoir
destinations.description: Largest hydroelectric dam in Sri Lanka. Scenic reservoir surrounded by mountains. Victoria Park and gardens nearby.

destinations.name: Teldeniya
destinations.description: Small town near Victoria Dam with river views. Base for exploring Mahaweli development. Agricultural area.

destinations.name: Kotmale Reservoir
destinations.description: Hydroelectric reservoir in beautiful mountain setting. Part of Mahaweli development. Scenic mountain backdrop.

destinations.name: Castlereagh Reservoir
destinations.description: Picturesque reservoir surrounded by tea estates. Cool climate and misty conditions. Popular picnic spot.

destinations.name: Hatton
destinations.description: Tea estate town and base for Adam's Peak climb. Tamil tea workers' culture. Cool mountain climate.

destinations.name: Maskeliya
destinations.description: Tea plantation area near Adam's Peak base. Multiple reservoirs including Canyon Falls viewpoint. Scenic mountain drives.

destinations.name: Laxapana Falls
destinations.description: 126-meter waterfall feeding hydroelectric power station. Seventh tallest in Sri Lanka. Misty mountain setting.

destinations.name: Talawakelle
destinations.description: Tea plantation town between Hatton and Nuwara Eliya. Colonial bungalows and tea factories. Cool climate.

destinations.name: Kotagala
destinations.description: Small tea estate town with beautiful scenery. Aberdeen Falls nearby. Less touristy hill country location.

destinations.name: Aberdeen Falls
destinations.description: 98-meter waterfall requiring moderate trek through tea estates. Less visited than other major falls. Natural pool at base.

destinations.name: Nanu Oya
destinations.description: Railway station serving Nuwara Eliya. Scenic train journey endpoint from Kandy. Cool climate junction town.

destinations.name: Ambewela
destinations.description: Highland plateau with dairy farms and grasslands. New Zealand-like landscape. Ambewela Farm produces milk for island.

destinations.name: Pattipola
destinations.description: Highest railway station in Sri Lanka at 1,898 meters. Scenic mountain plateau. Cold climate and misty conditions.

destinations.name: Ohiya
destinations.description: Small mountain village and trail start for Horton Plains trek. Beautiful highland scenery. Remote and peaceful.

destinations.name: Kalupahana
destinations.description: Remote village near Bambarakanda Falls. Highland farming community. Base for waterfall treks.

destinations.name: Koslanda
destinations.description: Small village near Diyaluma Falls. Tea estates and rural life. Base for waterfall exploration.

destinations.name: Passara
destinations.description: Small town near Namunukula mountain range. Agricultural center with scenic surroundings. Gateway to hiking areas.

destinations.name: Namunukula Mountain Range
destinations.description: Mountain range with trekking trails and panoramic views. Less visited than other peaks. Rich biodiversity.

destinations.name: Hambantota Town
destinations.description: District capital with new port and airport. Developing city with modern infrastructure. Gateway to southern wildlife parks.

destinations.name: Tissamaharama
destinations.description: Ancient capital and gateway to Yala. Tissa Wewa reservoir and Buddhist dagobas. Safari base town.

destinations.name: Kataragama
destinations.description: Sacred multi-religious pilgrimage town. Hindu, Buddhist, and indigenous worship. Major annual Esala festival.

destinations.name: Kirinda
destinations.description: Coastal village with rock temple overlooking ocean. Viharaya Temple and Queen Viharamahadevi legend. Beach and surf spot.

destinations.name: Ambalantota
destinations.description: Small town between Tangalle and Hambantota. Agricultural center and curd production. Rural Sri Lankan life.

destinations.name: Weerawila
destinations.description: Town with large bird sanctuary on reservoir. Migratory and resident waterbirds. Fishing community.

destinations.name: Beliatta
destinations.description: Small agricultural town near Walawe River. Birthplace of former president. Rural southern character.

destinations.name: Angunakolapelessa
destinations.description: Junction town connecting south to hill country. Agricultural area with paddy fields. Rest stop on travels.

destinations.name: Embilipitiya
destinations.description: Town gateway to Udawalawe Park. Agricultural center. Transit point between south and hill country.

destinations.name: Balangoda
destinations.description: Hill country town with prehistoric significance. Balangoda Man discovery site. Tea and rubber estates.

destinations.name: Samanalawewa Reservoir
destinations.description: Beautiful mountain reservoir for hydroelectricity. Scenic location on Adam's Peak approach. Fishing and boating.

destinations.name: Pelmadulla
destinations.description: Junction town on Colombo-Ratnapura road. Agricultural market center. Transit point for travelers.

destinations.name: Bolgoda Lake
destinations.description: Largest lake in Western Province with water sports facilities. Popular for jet skiing, kayaking, and boat rides. Mangrove ecosystems and birdlife.

destinations.name: Mount Lavinia Beach
destinations.description: Popular beach in Colombo suburbs with colonial heritage. Mount Lavinia Hotel overlooks beach. Swimming, dining, and sunset views.

destinations.name: Dehiwala Zoo
destinations.description: National Zoological Gardens with diverse animal collection. Elephant shows, aquarium, and butterfly garden. Popular family destination.

destinations.name: Diyaluma Falls
destinations.description: Second highest waterfall in Sri Lanka at 220 meters. Natural infinity pools at top with stunning views. Popular swimming spot.

destinations.name: Hanthana Mountain Range
destinations.description: Seven peaks near Kandy offering various hiking trails. Panoramic views of Kandy city and surrounding valleys. Rich biodiversity.
destinations.best_time_to_visit: January to March, July to September

destinations.name: Udawattakele Forest Reserve
destinations.description: Historic forest reserve on hill ridge overlooking Kandy. Royal forest with walking trails, diverse wildlife, and ancient trees.

destinations.name: Kurunegala
destinations.description: District capital with giant rock formations. Ethagala (Elephant Rock) dominates skyline. Buddhist temples and colonial buildings.

destinations.name: Ethagala (Elephant Rock)
destinations.description: Massive rock formation resembling elephant. Dominates Kurunegala skyline. Short hike to viewpoint offers city panorama.

destinations.name: Dambadeniya Ancient Kingdom
destinations.description: Medieval capital of Sri Lanka in 13th century. Ruins of royal palace, tooth relic temple, and ancient reservoirs.

destinations.name: Panduwasnuwara
destinations.description: Ancient kingdom ruins with moat and palace remains. 12th century capital. Well-preserved citadel and tank system.

destinations.name: Chilaw
destinations.description: Coastal town famous for Munneswaram Temple and lagoon. Fishing industry center. Gateway to Kalpitiya.

destinations.name: Munneswaram Temple
destinations.description: Ancient Hindu temple complex with five temples. Important pilgrimage site. Associated with Ramayana legend. Annual festivals.

destinations.name: Anamaduwa
destinations.description: Agricultural town known for pottery and traditional crafts. Ancient reservoirs and rural village experience.

destinations.name: Ratnapura Gem Mines
destinations.description: Gem mining capital of Sri Lanka. Visit working gem pits, museums, and trading centers. Famous for sapphires and rubies.
destinations.best_time_to_visit: Year-round, dry season better for mines

destinations.name: Maha Saman Devalaya
destinations.description: Important Buddhist-Hindu temple dedicated to deity Saman. Gateway to Adam's Peak pilgrimage. Annual Esala Perahera festival.

destinations.name: Bopath Ella Falls
destinations.description: Waterfall shaped like Bo leaf (sacred fig). 30 meters high with natural pool. Easy access from road. Legend of cursed treasure.

destinations.name: Kegalle Town
destinations.description: District capital on Colombo-Kandy highway. Gateway to Pinnawala Elephant Orphanage. Rubber and coconut plantation center.

destinations.name: Aranayake
destinations.description: Hill country town with tea estates and spice gardens. Base for Dediyagala rock climb. Cool climate and scenic landscapes.

destinations.name: Monaragala
destinations.description: District capital and gateway to eastern national parks. Agricultural center with ancient Buddhist sites. Peaceful rural town.

destinations.name: Wellawaya
destinations.description: Junction town connecting hill country to southern plains. Base for visiting Buduruwagala. Rice farming area.

destinations.name: Badulla Town
destinations.description: District capital and end of scenic train line from Colombo. Historic town with temples and colonial buildings. Hill country commercial center.

destinations.name: Muthiyangana Raja Maha Vihara
destinations.description: Ancient Buddhist temple believed visited by Buddha. Important pilgrimage site in Badulla. Annual Esala Perahera festival.

destinations.name: Bandarawela
destinations.description: Charming hill station with cool climate and colonial architecture. Tea estates and scenic railway. Slower pace than Ella or Nuwara Eliya.

destinations.name: Haputale
destinations.description: Small hill town with dramatic escarpment views. Lipton's Seat viewpoint nearby. Tea estate workers' culture and Tamil heritage.

destinations.name: Adisham Monastery
destinations.description: Benedictine monastery in English country house style. Built in 1931, now occupied by monks. Beautiful gardens and architecture.

destinations.name: Ampara
destinations.description: District capital with diverse ethnic community. Agricultural hub for rice cultivation. Gateway to eastern national parks.

destinations.name: Lahugala National Park
destinations.description: Small national park known for elephant population. Lahugala Tank attracts elephants year-round. Easy wildlife viewing from roadside.

destinations.name: Pottuvil
destinations.description: Coastal village near Arugam Bay. Pottuvil Point surf break and lagoon. Ancient Muhudu Maha Vihara temple nearby.

destinations.name: Kudumbigala Monastery
destinations.description: Ancient forest hermitage on rocky outcrop. Panoramic views of surrounding wilderness. Active meditation center with resident monks.

destinations.name: Panama
destinations.description: Remote fishing village with pristine beaches. Gateway to Kumana National Park. Peaceful atmosphere and beautiful sunrises.

destinations.name: Kalkudah Beach
destinations.description: Beautiful beach with calm shallow waters extending far from shore. Sister beach to Pasikuda. Safe swimming and water sports.

destinations.name: Kallady Beach
destinations.description: Beach in Batticaloa town with Lady Manning Bridge landmark. Singing fish phenomenon location. Urban beach with facilities.

destinations.name: Nilaveli Beach
destinations.description: Long stretch of white sand beach with turquoise waters. Gateway to Pigeon Island. Calm conditions ideal for swimming.

destinations.name: Uppuveli Beach
destinations.description: Quieter beach near Trincomalee with clear waters. Good for swimming and diving. Dutch Bay Beach nearby.

destinations.name: Koneswaram Temple
destinations.description: Ancient Hindu temple on Swami Rock cliff overlooking ocean. One of five Ishwarams of Shiva. Dramatic coastal location with history.

destinations.name: Fort Frederick
destinations.description: Portuguese fort later occupied by Dutch and British. Still active military area. Contains Koneswaram Temple within grounds.

destinations.name: Vavuniya
destinations.description: Gateway to Northern Province. Transport hub connecting north to rest of country. Agricultural market town.

destinations.name: Madhu Church
destinations.description: Important Catholic pilgrimage site. Our Lady of Madhu shrine. Peaceful forest setting. Annual feast attracts thousands.

destinations.name: Kilinochchi
destinations.description: District capital rebuilding after civil war. Historical significance. War memorials and new development.
